recommendations.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
recommendations.overview: King Arthur, accompanied by his squire, recruits his Knights of the Round Table, including Sir Bedevere the Wise, Sir Lancelot the Brave, Sir Robin the Not-Quite-So-Brave-As-Sir-Lancelot and Sir Galahad the Pure. On the way, Arthur battles the Black

recommendations.title: Avalanche Sharks
recommendations.genres: Horror, Action, Science Fiction, Adventure, Comedy
recommendations.overview: A snow avalanche awakens humungous, prehistoric sharks that proceed to chomp on bikini clad co-eds.

recommendations.title: Mega Shark vs. Giant Octopus
recommendations.overview: The California coast is terrorized by two enormous prehistoric sea creatures as they battle each other for supremacy of the sea.

recommendations.title: Count Dracula
recommendations.overview: A faithful adaptation of the classic tale portrays Dracula as an old man who grows younger whenever he dines on the blood of young maidens.

recommendations.title: Inception: The Cobol Job
recommendations.overview: Cobb, Arthur and Nash are enlisted by Cobol Engineering.

recommendations.title: Kaamelott: The First Chapter
recommendations.overview: Hidden in Rome, King Arthur is planning his return to oppose the army of his former friend Lancelot.

recommendations.title: Dracula
recommendations.overview: Romanticized adaptation of Bram Stoker's 1897 classic. Count Dracula is a subject of fatal attraction to more than one English maiden lady, as he seeks an immortal bride.

recommendations.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A young girl sent to live with her father and his new girlfriend discovers creatures in her new home who want to claim her as one of their own.

recommendations.title: The Time Machine
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Romance
recommendations.overview: A Victorian Englishman travels to the far future and finds that humanity has divided into two hostile species.
